# My Agent

Describe what your agent does pI want this GitHub repo to look impressive to recruiters hiring for roles such as:
- AI Evaluation Specialist
- Prompt Engineer
- LLM Evaluator
- AI Safety Analyst
- Model Behavior Researcher
- AI Quality Analyst

Please optimize the repo for those audiences.

Success criteria:
- README is strong enough to explain my focus in under 30 seconds
- project folders look intentional and research-driven
- case studies feel realistic and specific
- benchmark and scoring files feel systematic
- safety and jailbreak sections show alignment awareness
- experiments feel like documented testing work
- Python examples look credible and simple
- all files match the same professional tone

Do not create random extra files unless they support this goal.
Prefer fewer, stronger files over many weak files.
